mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.total_stock, b.available_stock, b.status, b.created_time, b.updated_time FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{bookId}
SELECT id, rule_name, borrow_days, renew_days, max_renew_count, fine_per_day, status FROM borrow_rule WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET available_stock = available_stock - 1 WHERE id = #{bookId} AND status = 'ON_SHELF' AND available_stock > 0
UPDATE book SET available_stock = available_stock + 1 WHERE id = #{bookId} AND available_stock < total_stock
mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.book_id, b.title, b.author, br.borrow_time, br.due_time, br.return_time, br.status, br.renew_count, rule.max_renew_count, br.overdue_days, br.fine_amount, rule.fine_per_day FROM borrow_record br INNER JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id INNER JOIN borrow_rule rule ON br.rule_id = rule.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_time DESC, br.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record br INNER JOIN borrow_rule rule ON br.rule_id = rule.id SET br.status = 'OVERDUE', br.overdue_days = GREATEST(DATEDIFF(#{now}, br.due_time), 1), br.fine_amount = GREATEST(DATEDIFF(#{now}, br.due_time), 1) * rule.fine_per_day WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.due_time < #{now}

UPDATE borrow_record br INNER JOIN borrow_rule rule ON br.rule_id = rule.id SET br.status = 'OVERDUE', br.overdue_days = GREATEST(DATEDIFF(#{now}, br.due_time), 1), br.fine_amount = GREATEST(DATEDIFF(#{now}, br.due_time), 1) * rule.fine_per_day WHERE br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.due_time < #{now}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fine_amount), 0.00) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND fine_amount > 0
SELECT b.title FROM borrow_record br INNER JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.status = 'OVERDUE' ORDER BY br.due_time ASC, br.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET fine_amount = 0.00 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND fine_amount > 0
